description: Be more proactive in reviewing posts. Provide feedback on why specific content doesn't align with thoughts/voice to improve future iterations.
Adjust content creation approach. Focus on unpacking Thiago's thoughts through dialogue rather than pre-writing posts. Aim for deeper, unique insights.

Review meeting transcript w/ Mara. Develop concrete post ideas based on Thiago's insights (AI replacing tasks not people, AI training bias, agent washing). Ensure ideas originate from Thiago, not AI-generated.
Revise strategy for presenting content to Thiago. Prepare concise, thought-provoking concepts directly related to his recent experiences/thoughts for faster approval.
